query:
so... col-031 completed: should I really run the evel as suggested? All gates passed — Gate 3a (design), 3b (code review), 3c   
  (test execution), security review.
                                                              
  Artifact: services/phase_freq_table.rs                      
  Status: New module — PhaseFreqTable, PhaseFreqTableHandle,  
    rebuild, phase_affinity_score                             
  ────────────────────────────────────────                  
  Artifact: query_log.rs                                      
  Status: PhaseFreqRow + query_phase_freq_table (time-based,  
    CAST-guarded SQL)                                         
  ────────────────────────────────────────                    
  Artifact: search.rs                                         
  Status: Fused scoring wire-up; use_fallback guard;
    ServiceSearchParams.current_phase                         
  ────────────────────────────────────────                  
  Artifact: background.rs
  Status: Tick rebuild with retain-on-error; lock order
    documented
  ────────────────────────────────────────
  Artifact: services/mod.rs + 5 call sites                    
  Status: PhaseFreqTableHandle non-optional at all 7 sites
  ────────────────────────────────────────                    
  Artifact: infra/config.rs                                   
  Status: w_phase_explicit 0.0→0.05;
  query_log_lookback_days=30                                  
  ────────────────────────────────────────                  
  Artifact: eval/scenarios/replay.rs
  Status: AC-16 one-line fix
  ────────────────────────────────────────
  Artifact: README                                            
  Status: [inference] config block updated
                                                              
  Tests: 3840 unit + 176 integration, 0 failures.             
  
  One manual step before closing #414: AC-12 eval gate — run  
  unimatrix eval against col-030 baseline scenarios to confirm
   current_phase is non-null in replay output. Noted in the GH
   issue comment.

entries.title: ADR-005 col-031: PhaseFreqTableHandle as Required Non-Optional Constructor Parameter
ADR-004 col-031: Activate w_phase_explicit at 0.05; AC-16 Non-Separable from AC-12
ADR-003 crt-036: PhaseFreqTable / K-cycle Alignment via Tick-Time Diagnostic Warning
contradiction scan O(N) ONNX cost: cache in ContradictionScanCache, tick writes every 4th tick, context_status reads cache
run_single_tick rebuild: use timeout+spawn+swap triple-nest; error branch must NOT write to handle
